23 typedef enum MW_RESULT {
24  MW_SUCCEEDED = 0x00,
25  MW_FAILED,
26  MW_INVALID_PARAMS,
27 };
28 
29 #ifdef _MSC_VER
30 DECLARE_HANDLE(HCHANNEL);
31 
32 DECLARE_MWHANDLE64(HTIMER);
33 
34 DECLARE_MWHANDLE64(HNOTIFY);
35 
36 DECLARE_MWHANDLE64(HOSD);
37 #else
38 typedef void * HCHANNEL;
39 
40 typedef uint64_t HTIMER;
41 
42 typedef uint64_t HNOTIFY;
43 
44 typedef uint64_t HOSD;
45 #endif

47 #define LEN_DEV_AUDIO_NAME 128
48 #define LEN_DEV_AUDIO_ID 256
49 
60 typedef union _MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE {
61  MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE_CARD firmwareStorageCard;
62  MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE_USB firmwareStorageUSB;
63 } MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE;
64 
65 typedef enum _MW_VIDEO_CAPTURE_MODE {
66  MW_VIDEO_CAPTURE_NORMAL = 0x00,
67  MW_VIDEO_CAPTURE_LOW_LATENCY,
68 } MW_VIDEO_CAPTURE_MODE;
69 
70 typedef void(*LPFN_VIDEO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK)(LPBYTE pbFrame,
71  DWORD cbFrame,
72  DWORD cbStride,
73  MWCAP_VIDEO_FRAME_INFO* pFrameInfo,
74  void* pvContent);
75 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE {
76  _MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE():
77  dwFOURCC(0),
78  iWidth(0),
79  iHeight(0),
80  captureMode(MW_VIDEO_CAPTURE_NORMAL),
81  lpfnVideoCaptureCallback(NULL),
82  pvContext(NULL),
83  dwFrameSize(0),
84  cbStride(0) {}
85 
86  DWORD dwFOURCC;
87  int iWidth;
88  int iHeight;
89  MW_VIDEO_CAPTURE_MODE captureMode;
90  LPFN_VIDEO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK lpfnVideoCaptureCallback;
91  MWCAP_PTR64 pvContext;
92 
93  DWORD dwFrameSize;
94  DWORD cbStride;
95 } MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE;
96 
97 typedef void(*LPFN_AUDIO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK)(MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_FRAME* pAudioCaptureFrame, void* pvContent);
98 typedef struct _MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE {
99  _MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE() :
100  lpfnAudioCaptureCallback(NULL),
101  pvContext(NULL) {}
102 
103  LPFN_AUDIO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK lpfnAudioCaptureCallback;
104  MWCAP_PTR64 pvContext;
105 } MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE;
106 
107 
117 typedef enum _MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_NODE {
118  MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_NODE_DEFAULT,
119  MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_NODE_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE,
120  MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_NODE_MICROPHONE,
121  MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_NODE_USB_CAPTURE,
122  MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_NODE_LINE_IN,
123 } MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_NODE;
124 
135 typedef enum _MWCAP_AUDIO_NODE {
136  MWCAP_AUDIO_MICROPHONE,
137  MWCAP_AUDIO_HEADPHONE,
138  MWCAP_AUDIO_LINE_IN,
139  MWCAP_AUDIO_LINE_OUT,
140  MWCAP_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE,
141  MWCAP_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_PLAYBACK,
142  MWCAP_AUDIO_USB_CAPTURE,
143  MWCAP_AUDIO_USB_PLAYBACK
144 } MWCAP_AUDIO_NODE;

155 typedef struct _MWCAP_AUDIO_DEVICE_INFO{
156  TCHAR szName[LEN_DEV_AUDIO_NAME];
157  TCHAR szID[LEN_DEV_AUDIO_ID];
158 }MWCAP_AUDIO_DEVICE_INFO;
159 
160 typedef void(*LPFN_NOTIFY_CALLBACK)(MWCAP_PTR64 pNotify, DWORD dwEnableBits, void* pvContent);
161 typedef struct _MWCAP_NOTIFY {
162  _MWCAP_NOTIFY() :
163  pvNotifyEvent(NULL),
164  hEvent(NULL),
165  ullEnableBits(0LL),
166  lpfnNotifyCallback(NULL),
167  pvContent(NULL) {}
168 
169  MWCAP_PTR64 pvNotifyEvent;
170  HANDLE hEvent;
171  ULONGLONG ullEnableBits;
172  LPFN_NOTIFY_CALLBACK lpfnNotifyCallback;
173  void* pvContent;
174 } MWCAP_NOTIFY;
175 
176 
177 typedef void(*LPFN_TIMER_CALLBACK)(MWCAP_PTR64 pTimer, void* pvContent);
178 typedef struct _MWCAP_TIMER {
179  _MWCAP_TIMER() :
180  lpfnTimerCallback(NULL),
181  llTimeout(0LL),
182  llRepeat(0LL),
183  llnextTime(0LL),
184  pvContent(NULL) {}
185 
186  bool operator<(const _MWCAP_TIMER another) {
187  return llnextTime < another.llnextTime;
188  }
189 
190  LPFN_TIMER_CALLBACK lpfnTimerCallback;
191  LONGLONG llTimeout;
192  LONGLONG llRepeat;
193  LONGLONG llnextTime;
194  void* pvContent;
195 } MWCAP_TIMER;
196 
197 
205 typedef struct _VIDEO_FORMAT_INFO
206 {
207  UINT cx;
208  UINT cy;
209  char colorSpace[16];
210  int nFrameDuration;
211 } VIDEO_FORMAT_INFO;

221 typedef struct _VIDEO_FRAMERATE{
222  int nFrameDuration;
223  float fFPS;
224 }MWCAP_VIDEO_FRAMERATE;

234  int nFrameDurationDen;
235  int nFrameDurationNum;
236 }MWCAP_VIDEO_FRAMERATE_EX;

248  MWCAP_VIDEO_RESOLUTION_MODE_LIST

259 typedef struct _VIDEO_RESOLUTION{
260  UINT cx;
261  UINT cy;
262 }MWCAP_VIDEO_RESOLUTION;

272 typedef struct _VIDEO_RESOLUTION_RANGE{
273  int nStepCx;
274  int nStepCy;
275  MWCAP_VIDEO_RESOLUTION minResolution;
276  MWCAP_VIDEO_RESOLUTION maxResolution;
277 }MWCAP_VIDEO_RESOLUTION_RANGE;

287  int nListSize;
288  MWCAP_VIDEO_RESOLUTION* plistResolution;

300 {

302  UINT nBitCount;
303  UINT nSamplerate;

352 {

354  MWCAP_VIDEO_PROC_CONTRAST,
355  MWCAP_VIDEO_PROC_HUE,
356  MWCAP_VIDEO_PROC_SATURATION
357 } MWCAP_VIDEO_PROC_PARAM_TYPE;

377 #define MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_SIZE 24
378 #define MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_INTERVAL 8

380 typedef struct _MWCAP_USB_VIDEO_PROCESS_SETTINGS {
381  DWORD dwProcessSwitchs; // MWCAP_VIDEO_PROCESS_xx
382  MWRECT rectSource;
383  int nAspectX;
384  int nAspectY;
385  BOOLEAN bLowLatency;
386  MWCAP_VIDEO_COLOR_FORMAT colorFormat;
387  MWCAP_VIDEO_QUANTIZATION_RANGE quantRange;
388  MWCAP_VIDEO_SATURATION_RANGE satRange;
389  MWCAP_VIDEO_DEINTERLACE_MODE deinterlaceMode;
390  MWCAP_VIDEO_ASPECT_RATIO_CONVERT_MODE aspectRatioConvertMode;
391 } MWCAP_USB_VIDEO_PROCESS_SETTINGS;
